arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly confident they can win the race for Alexander Isak and tempt the Newcastle United forward to the Emirates Stadium with the strength of their project. arts.sum: The UEFA Champions League continues for Arsenal on Tuesday evening, as they make the trip to face Liga Portugal leaders Sporting. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provi...

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal learn Mbeumo price tag
arts.sum: Manchester United will have to contend with Arsenal and Newcastle for Brentford forward Bryan Mbeumo ahead of January, according to reports. It comes after Bees head coach Thomas Frank admitted that he would sign Mbeumo if he were at a bigger club.

arts.ttl: ‘That’s what you have to do’: Pundit says Arsenal might change formation to suit one player
arts.sum: Arsenal have an immense amount of talent in their squad at the moment, and it’s difficult to get all of these players on the pitch...

arts.ttl: Arsenal slammed over attempts to sign Euro 2024 superstar
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen CEO Fernando Carro has hit out at Arsenal and all other clubs pushing to sign Florian Wirtz . Carro is not happy with the constant speculation about Arsenal, Real Madrid and other clubs, and he also is confident that Wirtz is going nowhere.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Hammarby winger attracting interest from five clubs?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly among five clubs who are considering whether to make an approach for Hammarby winger Bazoumana Toure.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta and Theo Walcott agree on 'predictable' problem that Arsenal wonderkid can solve
arts.sum: Speaking on Sky Sports' Monday Night Football show ahead of Arsenal's clash against Sporting, Walcott referenced the playmaker's connection with Bukayo Saka. "You would expect them to dominate a lot more games but now you see Odegaard coming back, the connection he has with Saka," said the former Gunner.

arts.ttl: £30m bid could be enough for Arsenal or Aston Villa to get transfer done
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly been told that £30million would be enough for them to secure the transfer of Ajax midfielder Kenneth Taylor. The talented 22-year-old has been impressing with his form in the Eredivisie, and sources recently told CaughtOffside about interest from Arsenal as well. ALMOST the perfect result for Arsenal!
